reviews.review_description: I was excited to try this and at first it did creep me out however after the first few times of seeing "it" that crawls , the creep factor kinda went away. I would recommend others getting this bc everyone's jump scares are different and this might be terrifying for others. It's definitely creepy tho!!

I just wasted my money downloading this game the creature like its stuck and kind of jumping and jumping doing nothing u cannot even die in this game no challenges just finding the battery thats all u cannot even get scare on the creature his just  standing there not moving so i want a refund on my money
I only found 3 batteries but it was a terrifying experience
This was a waste of money and time
